source: wynncraft.wiki.gg/wiki/Lootrunning — Lootrun Division table + Daily Bonus section
note: Ordered ladder. Rank gates beacon availability, starting rerolls, base beacon/boon choices, vibrancy chance, interlude walk speed, and whether the daily bonus includes a Reward Reroll.

progression.xpPerRun: Awarded at the END of a completed run, scaled by challenges completed. Max 500 XP per run, or up to 700 including the daily bonus.
progression.persistence: Ranks are permanent; XP requirements are cumulative.

dailyBonus.scope: First run at EACH Lootrun Camp, each day — not once per day overall. With 7 camps that is up to 7 daily bonuses.
dailyBonus.rewardRerollNote: The +1 Reward Reroll is granted ONLY at Elite II or higher. XP and pulls are unconditional.
dailyBonus.silverbull: A Silverbull Subscription DOUBLES the daily bonus.
dailyBonus.refreshTokens: Lootrun Daily Bonus Refresh Tokens re-grant the bonus, max 3 per run (6 tokens for 4 Shares). Basis of the Token Assisted Speedrun.
dailyBonus.STRATEGY_IMPACT: Runs do not start from zero. A Grandmaster with Silverbull opens at +20 pulls and +2 reward rerolls, which lowers the marginal value of High Roller (+1 reward reroll) and Redemption.

grandmasterNote: Grandmaster itself grants NO additional perk — it is purely the ladder cap. Master (crimson) is the last rank that unlocks anything.

ranks.name: Assistant III
ranks.note: Walk speed is not cosmetic: it shortens interludes, which directly reduces Adrenaline Junkie's boon drain (1 boon per 25s during interludes).

ranks.name: Sentinel II
ranks.note: Both defaults. Confirmed bases at high rank are 2 beacon choices and 4 boon choices, so below this rank they are 1 and 3.

ranks.name: Elite II
ranks.note: Vibrancy reaches 10% total. Also the gate for the daily bonus's +1 Reward Reroll.
